sub_modules.fpm_unpack: Combinational operand decoder that extracts sign, exponent, fraction, effective significand, unbiased exponent, and IEEE-754 class flags.
sub_modules.fpm_special_cases: Combinational special-case handler for NaNs, infinities, zero operands, invalid operations, and associated exception flags.
sub_modules.fpm_mul_normalize: Combinational significand multiplier and leading-one normalizer that produces normalized significand bits plus guard, round, and sticky bits.
sub_modules.fpm_round_pack: Combinational rounding, overflow/underflow detection, flush-to-zero handling, and final floating-point result packing.
